tasks.title: Portable hook manifest (kit/core/hooks.json)
tasks.description:
Create a tool-agnostic hook definition format that adapters translate into each tool's native hook system. Covers PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart, SessionEnd. Inspired by claw-code's hook execution pipeline.

Scope: kit/core/hooks.json (new), kit/adapters/*.sh (update to install hooks)
Test: Add validateKit() checks for hook schema validity.

tasks.title: Per-agent tool access control in agents.json
tasks.description:
Define which tools each agent tier can use. Prevents expensive opus agents from doing cheap grep work. Adds a 'tools' allowlist per agent in agents.json.

Scope: kit/core/agents.json (update)
Test: Validate tool references exist in a tool registry.

tasks.title: Cost tracking config and session budget limits
tasks.description:
Add cost awareness to token-optimization.json: per-session budget caps, per-agent cost limits, cost report format. Inspired by claw-code's cost_tracker.py and costHook.py.

Scope: kit/core/token-optimization.json (update), kit/core/skills/cost.md (new skill)
Test: Validate cost config structure.

tasks.title: Create dispatch skill for spawning subtasks
tasks.description:
Skill for breaking work into parallel subtasks, assigning to worker agents, and collecting results. Maps to claw-code's Task*/Team* tool pattern but as a portable skill.

Scope: kit/core/skills/dispatch.md (new)
Test: Validate skill frontmatter.

tasks.title: Create schedule skill for recurring automated runs
tasks.description:
Skill for defining recurring agent tasks (cron-like). Covers CI monitoring, dependency updates, security scans on schedule. Inspired by claw-code's ScheduleCronTool.

Scope: kit/core/skills/schedule.md (new)
Test: Validate skill frontmatter.

tasks.title: Review and merge PR #24 (autonomous loop + skills)
tasks.description:
Wait for CI, address any review comments, merge the feature/oh-my-compat-adapters branch into main.

URL: https://github.com/Forge-Space/ai-dev-toolkit/pull/24

tasks.title: Release v0.11.0 after PR #24 merge
tasks.description:
Promote CHANGELOG [Unreleased] to v0.11.0, bump package.json, tag, create GitHub release.

Scope: CHANGELOG.md, package.json, git tag

tasks.title: Expand kit/core/mcp.json with recommended MCP servers per tool
tasks.description:
Current mcp.json is minimal. Add recommended servers (filesystem, git, fetch, context7, sequential-thinking) with per-tool enable/disable guidance.

Scope: kit/core/mcp.json (update), adapters (update MCP merge logic)

tasks.title: Create memory skill for cross-session persistence
tasks.description:
Skill for syncing decisions, preferences, and project state to persistent memory. Covers what to remember, where to store it, and how to recall it.

Scope: kit/core/skills/memory.md (new)

tasks.title: Create parity audit script comparing kit/core capabilities across tools
tasks.description:
Inspired by claw-code's PARITY.md — a script that audits which features each tool adapter actually supports vs what kit/core defines. Produces a gap report.

Scope: scripts/parity-audit.js (new), test (new)

tasks.title: Formal JSON schemas for all kit/core configs
tasks.description:
Create JSON Schema files for agents.json, routing.json, autopilot.json, loop.json, token-optimization.json, hooks.json. Enable IDE validation and CI enforcement.

Scope: kit/schema/*.schema.json (new), scripts/validate-schemas.js (update)

tasks.title: Design portable plugin system for kit extensions
tasks.description:
Allow third-party skills, hooks, and tool configs to be installed via forge-kit. Inspired by claw-code's plugin lifecycle and oh-my-openagent's plugin model.

Scope: kit/plugins/ (new directory), kit/install.sh (update), design doc

tasks.title: Document skill format differences for Cursor and Windsurf
tasks.description:
Cursor uses .mdc rules format, Windsurf uses .windsurfrules. Document how kit/core/skills/*.md map to each tool's native skill/rule format and update adapters if needed.

Scope: implementations/cursor/README.md, implementations/ (new windsurf/README.md)

tasks.title: Create implementations/antigravity/ reference guide
tasks.description:
Antigravity adapter exists but has no reference implementation docs. Create setup guide similar to claude-code/codex/opencode.

Scope: implementations/antigravity/ (new directory + README.md)

tasks.title: Add local RAG engine kit
tasks.description: Add kit/rag with SQLite-backed MiniLM embeddings, BM25 + RRF retrieval, optional reranker, MCP server, hooks, context-pack, and weekly drift reporting.

tasks.title: Add Agent-OS-inspired specs kit
tasks.description: Add kit/specs with per-feature docs/specs frontmatter, tasks.md lifecycle, shipped archive flow, and generated per-repo plus cross-repo roadmap views.
